title: App Settings - General - Account - Log in
scenario: User account login via App Settings > General > Account shows Name and Email fields populated and Share data hidden
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app as a guest user.
2. Tap the hamburger menu icon (☰) to open the navigation drawer.
6. Enter valid user credentials and complete the login process.
expected: "Your account" text is visible with Name and Email fields populated with the user's name and email address. Share data should not be visible.
